project: 前缘舱装配序列规划算法
method: two-stage object-sequence optimization then process-task inference

objective_sources.spatial_jump_penalty: 3D Euclidean distance between adjacent Object OBB centers, normalized by median pairwise OBB-center distance; large jumps and reverse movement on the dominant OBB-center flow axis use nonlinear penalty
excluded: manual reference sequence as hard coding
